subject: Maceret Alexei Artur

system_anomaly.hidden_evidence: Translation of VSP 1ra-834/09 suppressed for 12 years (2009-2021).

audit_findings.analysis: Intentional desynchronization between physical archives and the PIGD digital database to block rehabilitation.

jus_cogens_impact: Violation of the right to a public hearing and fair trial (Art. 6 ECHR).
